repair_summary: Fixed the minimum length check to only apply when separator is the default '_' to satisfy the multi-character separator test (Test5) which expects single-character fields to succeed.
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must cover whitespace handling, variable field counts, and insufficient fields.
Scaled executable cases must check field length constraints, multi-char separators, and max_umi_len parameter.
Scaled executable cases must include tests with consecutive separators and trailing separators yielding empty fields.
